name: Sushi Yasumitsu
description_en: A sushi restaurant in Yotsuya full of warmth and hospitality

name: Sushi Mikuni
description_en: 5-minute walk from Iidabashi Station on the JR Chuo Line 4-minute walk from Exit B3 of Iidabashi Station on the Tokyo Metro Line

name: Cusavilla（Formerly erba da nakahigashi ）
description_en: Enjoy the allure of Japan by Italian style, and sense the spirit of Nakahigashi for yourself.

name: Sushi Kimura (Nihonbashi)
description_en: Seafood from Aomori prefecture, prepared with skills cultivated in New York and at a long-established Edo-style sushi restaurant, to bring you the best Japan has to offer

name: Tsukiji Aozora Sandaime Marunouchi
description_en: An authentic Edomae sushi restaurant featuring carefully selected ingredients, such as tuna from Fujita Suisan, which is favored by many sushi chefs

name: DeLIZIE
description_en: Diners can enjoy dignified Italian in a mature yet casual atmosphere

name: Kifuu
description_en: A Japanese cuisine restaurant that values the four colorful seasons

name: Tsukiji Aozora Sandaime Honten
description_en: Enjoy the overwhelming taste of tuna from Fujita Suisan and indulge in “Tsukiji sushi” that reinterprets authentic Edomae sushi in a casual way

name: Restaurant Hiramatsu Hiroo
description_en: An artistic grand maison featuring the sensibilities of chef Hiroki Hiramatsu

name: Unagi Tokito
description_en: Fusion eel cuisine produced by a master chef dedicated to this key ingredient

name: Vierge
description_en: A Gotanda bistro run by a chef from a three-star French restaurant

name: Nihonryori RyuGin
description_en: A world-class Japanese restaurant that symbolizes the richness of Japan

name: Edomaezushi Sushi Tsu
description_en: A favourite of sushi connoisseurs, this sushi restaurant in Nishiazabu prepares vinegared rice to match matured ingredients

name: Nihon Ryori Juko
description_en: Enjoy delicacies and simple Japanese cuisine in this Ginza restaurant

name: Rokusho
description_en: A secret hideout in Nakameguro for grown-ups who appreciate fine art, good food, and the premium Clase Azul tequila

name: Ginza Wakuta
description_en: Enjoy the tastes of the season in relaxing fully-private rooms

name: LATURE
description_en: A young chef who specializes in game dishes, showing his deep respect for nature and tradition of French cuisine.

name: Oryori Taichi
description_en: While enjoying a chat with the chef, you can savor series of refined dishes, designed to bring out the subtle qualities of each ingredients, and top it off with soba noodles.

name: Sushi Masuda
description_en: A popular sushi restaurant in Minami Aoyama that offers a unique style of sushi built around classic sushi-making techniques passed down from renowned chefs

name: Yakumo Saryo
description_en: Indulge in a world of flavors and culinary arts at this visionary Japanese restaurant in Meguro

name: shirato
description_en: A restaurant in Roppongi that serves innovative fusion cuisine that can only be enjoyed here

name: Yakitori Tokoshima
description_en: Taste rare part of fresh chicken at the Yakitori restaurant listed on world gourmet guide

name: Okon
description_en: A hidden gem of a Japanese restaurant in Yoyogi-Uehara, serving lovingly made clay pot rice.

name: Nishiazabu Otake
description_en: Enjoy the taste of the season to its fullest with a menu that features dishes from a prominent 1-star restaurant, as well as original fare

name: Cantonese cuisine Akasaka Rikyu Ginza Branch
description_en: Taking a balanced Cantonese cuisine to new heights with Japanese ingredients.

name: ENEKO Tokyo
description_en: A combination of culture with "the sustainable harmony", by a 3-star chef from Basque

name: Ginza Shin Fu En
description_en: A Ginza style "innovative Chinese" restaurant with great hospitality in a chic space

name: atelier morimoto XEX
description_en: Enjoy sushi, teppanyaki, and bar fare at a secluded restaurant presented by the Iron Chef of Japanese Cuisine in Roppongi

name: Araki
description_en: Return to the roots! A new start made in Akasaka to bring Edomae (Tokyo style) sushi to the world by a renowned chef who has distinguished himself in London and Hong Kong

name: Azabu kuma san
description_en: Referral-only meat kappo restaurant opens in Azabu Juban, Tokyo

name: L'ARGENT
description_en: Helmed by a starred chef, this contemporary 1-star restaurant in the beating heart of Ginza presents French cuisine prepared with Japanese finesse in spectacular surroundings

name: Sushi Ryo
description_en: A next-generation Edomae sushi restaurant opened in Ginza in 2020 a by a chef at the tender age of 24

name: Sushi Takehan Wakatsuki
description_en: Edomae-style sushi that continues to incite awe-inspiring excitement

name: Arakicho　Tenpaku
description_en: Tempura restaurant in Arakicho that prepares carefully selected seasonal ingredients with "thick white sesame oil”

name: Ristorante Osawa
description_en: Enjoy authentic Italian food in a traditional Japanese building with views of a beautiful Japanese garden.

name: Kaika
description_en: Enjoy supreme Wagyu and seasonal ingredients in teppanyaki way, a dining space built by Kyoto's Sukiya-zukuri workers

name: Sushi Ichijo
description_en: The technique of a veteran artisan shines at this orthodox Edomae-sushi restaurant

name: Sushi Rinda
description_en: A treasure of sushi in Meguro that is avant-garde and playful

name: Hakone Honbako
description_en: Book Auberge in Hakone showcases the food culture and history of Tokaido through the art of Italian cooking

name: Sushi Karaku
description_en: Enjoy the craftsmanship of Edo-style sushi perfectly paired with wine

name: Hakuun
description_en: A 1-star Japanese restaurant in Minami Aoyama helmed by a chef trained at the three-star restaurant

name: merachi
description_en: Enjoy a unique gastronomical experience at the counter of a modern Italian restaurant in Nishi-Azabu

name: SOMBREUIL
description_en: The staff of the legendary famous restaurant converged on here again. Everything is the finest in this Grand Maison

name: sio
description_en: Pioneering a new restaurants age with tea pairing

name: Miyasaka
description_en: Elegant and sophisticated One Star Japanese-cuisine restaurant

name: Sushi Haru
description_en: Enjoy Edomae style sushi hidden away in Akasaka

name: CIRPAS
description_en: A French restaurant opened in Shiroganedai (Tokyo) by a celebrated chef with a distinguished career to present his culinary philosophy with innovative originality and passion

name: Nishi
description_en: Enjoy natural wine and hot sake at a sushi restaurant mainly open for lunch

name: Sushi Nakamura
description_en: A new style of Edomae-style sushi with an unique sense

name: Sirokanedai Kobayashi
description_en: Enjoy special hospitality at the gentle wooden counter

name: MONOLITH
description_en: Perfect One Star French restaurant for matured guests, featuring seasonal ingredients and a relaxed atmosphere guaranteed to satisfy you 100%

name: Umidori
description_en: A mecca for Japanese sake lovers, this renowned restaurant reopened after renovation in Yotsuya, Tokyo

name: Matsuzaka Ushi Kaiseki Shin
description_en: Enjoy Matsusaka beef with kaiseki style filled with creativity

name: KOBAYASHI

name: OMOTESANDO HYENE

name: Alveare
description_en: ​A hidden Italian restaurant in Motoazabu

name: Onarimon Haru
description_en: The essence of Japanese cuisine, with the timing when ingredients shine beautifully

name: Sushi Hiroya
description_en: Enjoy the perfect combination of elaborately made sushi, à la carte dishes, and Japanese sake

name: Ginza Komon (Kirakutei)
description_en: Enjoy the dishes and chilled sake offered by a self-taught chef at Ginza Komon, or the former Kugayama Kirakutei

name: Don Bravo
description_en: A sharp Italian, with full of Japanese essence and creativity

name: Sushi Keita
description_en: A world gourmet guide award restaurant in Tsukiji with a relaxed atmosphere and Edomae-style sushi crafted with skills honed at noted establishments

name: Mori
description_en: A hideaway French restaurant limited to only 2-3 groups per day

name: L'Effervescence
description_en: Innovative French cuisine born from artistic intuition and analysis

name: L'EAU
description_en: A French restaurant in Minami-Aoyama, serving cuisine that flows like running water

name: Hatsunezushi
description_en: A sushi restaurant popular among connoisseurs for its exquisite seafood as well as the chef’s skillful culinary performances

name: Hinabe Mita
description_en: Enjoy Sichuan hotpot in Mita

name: Oniku Karyu
description_en: Enjoy the essence of black wagyu and Japanese cuisine at the world gourmet guide award restaurant, Niku Kappo.

name: Azabu Asai
description_en: A washoku restaurant featuring the sensibilities of the Nishi-Azabu area -- going beyond definitions of Japanese cuisine

name: Restaurant Re:
description_en: Light, original French cuisine that utilizes Japanese-style culinary “subtraction.”

name: ASAHINA Gastronome
description_en: A 2-star Exquisite gastronomy by a favored disciple of Joël Robuchon

name: Alie Blanche
description_en: Elegant French with magics of foie gras

name: AMOUR
description_en: Elegant French Restaurant Presenting Japanese Love. world gourmet guide award.

name: MAZ
description_en: A modern gastronomic project created by a talented chef ranked No.1 in the world to showcase the nature and culture of Peru

name: Shintomicho Yuasa
description_en: With special shark fin dish, a Chinese restaurant reflecting the season with focus on seafood and vegetables

name: Oryouri Mukyu
description_en: A Once-in-a-Lifetime Dining Experience Guided by Mukyu’s Endless Pursuit

name: Yakitori & Wine Moto
description_en: Yakitori × Fermentation × Natural Wine: A New Style Coming Out of Roppongi

name: S'accapau
description_en: Creative Italian with Vin Naturel wines

description_en: A two-star restaurant in Roppongi that offers sublime Edomae (Tokyo-style) sushi handed down from a renowned sushi restaurant

name: Sushi Band
description_en: A more casual version of the sushi restaurant, "Takumi Tatsuhiro"

name: malca
description_en: An underground Italian restaurant in Gaienmae that offers a wide selection of a la carte dishes to choose from

name: PRIMO PASSO
description_en: An Italian restaurant opened in Shintomicho by an Italian-trained chef to offer local Italian dishes tailored to Japanese tastes

name: Alter Ego
description_en: A world gourmet guide awarded chef brings traditional Italian cuisine from Milan to Jimbocho

name: Restaurant Kodama
description_en: Healthy Japanese Cuisine Made with a Unique Philosophy

name: Kanton Meisai Akasaka Rikyu Restaurant
description_en: Delicate and Daring, Cantonese cuisine that combined with Japanese ingredients

name: Myoujyaku
description_en: A 3-star Japanese restaurant in Nishiazabu that celebrates the essence of ingredients, as implied by its name

name: DEN KUSHI FLORI

name: Sumibi Yakiniku Nakahara

name: Sushi Mamoru

name: Kohou
description_en: Comfortably enjoy the gourmet journey from the counter seat: a new style of Chinese cuisine with various pairings.

name: Shunkeian Arakaki
description_en: Enjoy seasonal and sophisticated Japanese cuisine and tempura which uses carefully selected ingredients.

name: Tempura Shimomura
description_en: Innovative world gourmet guide award tempura restaurant born in downtown Tokyo. Please enjoy flavors inherited from the famous tempura restaurant, Yamanoue.

name: Sushi Takaya (Formerly Sushi Kutani)
description_en: Enjoy traditional and modern sushi that stimulates the five senses

name: Azabujyuban Hatano Yoshiki
description_en: Traditional skill combining with personal specially, a revolution of Edo Sushi.
